churn_rate.definition: Percentage of users who stopped purchasing within a given period
churn_rate.notes: A user is considered churned if they have no orders in the last 30 days after their first purchase

ROI.definition: Return on investment for a campaign
ROI.notes: sale_price and cost come from the order_items table

conversion_rate.definition: Percentage of users who made a purchase after visiting
conversion_rate.notes: visiting_users come from the events table, purchasing_users from orders

time_periods.last_month: DATE between the first and last day of the previous calendar month
time_periods.last_quarter: DATE between the first day of 3 months ago and the last day of last month

campaign_types.new_campaign: Events or orders where traffic_source IS NOT NULL, filtered to the target time period

user_segments.new_user: Users whose first order is within the target time period
user_segments.returning_user: Users who have more than 1 order total
user_segments.churned_user: Users with no orders in the last 30 days after being active
